etymology.description: 心(心) (xīn, "heart") + 囱(囱) (cōng) = original form had heart with dot -> evolved to include 囱 pattern -> clever -> preserved in 聰(聰) (cōng, "intelligent")
etymology.interpretation: The character 悤 originally depicted a heart with a dot on top, symbolizing intelligence, and evolved into a patterned shape. The notion of intelligence as holes on the heart is a traditional concept, leading to the character 聰(聰) (cōng, "intelligent"). Over time, 悤 acquired meanings associated with fast learning or hasty action.
